verification.title: (11/12) Staudruck qp
verification.graph_json: {"version":1,"nodes":[{"id":"var_z","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":40},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"z","label":"z Gebäudehöhe","unit":"m","default_value":"8","description":"Massgebende Höhe über Gelände (i.d.R. Traufhöhe).","inputKind":"number","options":[]}},{"id":"var_qp0","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":180},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"qp0","label":"qp0 Referenzstaudruck","unit":"kN/m²","default_value":"0.9","description":"Referenzstaudruck aus Karte Anhang E SIA 261 (Windzone / Region).","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"label":"Windzone 1 - geschützte Lagen (qp0 = 0.70 kN/m²)","value":"0.7","sort_order":0},{"label":"Windzone 2 - Mittelland, Voralpen (qp0 = 0.90 kN/m²)","value":"0.9","sort_order":1},{"label":"Windzone 3 - Alpen, exponierte Lagen (qp0 = 1.30 kN/m²)","value":"1.3","sort_order":2},{"label":"Windzone 4 - Hochlagen, Alpenkämme (qp0 = 2.00 kN/m²)","value":"2.0","sort_order":3}]}},{"id":"var_GK","type":"variable","position":{"x":40,"y":340},"data":{"kind":"variable","name":"GK","label":"Geländekategorie","unit":"−","default_value":"3","description":"Geländekategorie nach Tab. 4 SIA 261. Bestimmt Gradientenhöhe zg und Bodenrauigkeitsexponent alpha_r.","inputKind":"dropdown","options":[{"label":"II - Seeufer, offshore, offenes Gelände (zg=300 m, alpha_r=0.16)","value":"2","sort_order":0},{"label":"IIa - Grosse Ebene, Flachland (zg=380 m, alpha_r=0.19)","value":"2.1","sort_order":1},{"label":"III - Ortschaften, freies Feld (zg=450 m, alpha_r=0.23)","value":"3","sort_order":2},{"label":"IV - Grossflächige Stadtgebiete (zg=526 m, alpha_r=0.30)","value":"4","sort_order":3}]}},{"id":"calc_zg","type":"calc","position":{"x":430,"y":90},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"z_g","label":"Gradientenhöhe zg","unit":"m","latex":"z_g = z_g(GK)","expr":"+GK === 2 ? 300 : +GK === 2.1 ? 380 : +GK === 4 ? 526 : 450","description":"Gradientenhöhe aus Geländekategorie nach SIA 261 Tab. 4."}},{"id":"calc_alpha","type":"calc","position":{"x":430,"y":240},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"alpha_r","label":"Rauigkeitsexponent alpha_r","unit":"−","latex":"\\alpha_r = \\alpha_r(GK)","expr":"+GK === 2 ? 0.16 : +GK === 2.1 ? 0.19 : +GK === 4 ? 0.30 : 0.23","description":"Bodenrauigkeitsexponent aus Geländekategorie nach SIA 261 Tab. 4."}},{"id":"calc_zmin","type":"calc","position":{"x":430,"y":390},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"z_min","label":"Mindesthöhe zmin","unit":"m","latex":"z_{min} = z_{min}(GK)","expr":"+GK === 4 ? 10 : 5","description":"Mindesthöhe für das Windprofil."}},{"id":"calc_zeff","type":"calc","position":{"x":760,"y":70},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"z_eff","label":"Wirksame Höhe","unit":"m","latex":"z_{eff} = \\max(z, z_{min})","expr":"Math.max(z_min, z)","description":"Für niedrige Gebäude wird mindestens zmin angesetzt."}},{"id":"calc_ch","type":"calc","position":{"x":1080,"y":180},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"c_h","label":"Höhenbeiwert ch","unit":"−","latex":"c_h = 1{,}6 \\cdot (z_{eff}/z_g)^{2\\alpha_r} + 0{,}375","expr":"1.6 * Math.pow(z_eff / z_g, 2 * alpha_r) + 0.375","description":"Profilbeiwert nach SIA 261 §6.2.1."}},{"id":"calc_qp","type":"calc","position":{"x":1410,"y":200},"data":{"kind":"calc","name":"q_p","label":"Staudruck qp","unit":"kN/m²","latex":"q_p = c_h \\cdot q_{p0}","expr":"c_h * qp0","description":"Charakteristischer Staudruck nach SIA 261 §6.2.1."}}],"edges":[{"id":"e_gk_zg","source":"var_GK","target":"calc_zg","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_gk_alpha","source":"var_GK","target":"calc_alpha","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_gk_zmin","source":"var_GK","target":"calc_zmin","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_z_z_eff","source":"var_z","target":"calc_zeff","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_zmin_z_eff","source":"calc_zmin","target":"calc_zeff","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_z_eff_ch","source":"calc_zeff","target":"calc_ch","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_zg_ch","source":"calc_zg","target":"calc_ch","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_alpha_ch","source":"calc_alpha","target":"calc_ch","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_ch_qp","source":"calc_ch","target":"calc_qp","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}},{"id":"e_qp0_qp","source":"var_qp0","target":"calc_qp","sourceHandle":null,"targetHandle":null,"data":{"kind":"workflow"}}],"display_order":["var_z","var_qp0","var_GK","calc_zg","calc_alpha","calc_zmin","calc_zeff","calc_ch","calc_qp"]}
